title: diphasiastrum kablikianum
intro: Diphasiastrum kablikianum, also known as the Kablik's forked polypody, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum kablikianum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Diphasiastrum kablikianum can be made by infusing the dried plant material in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing the plant's extract with other herbs to create a topical ointment or tincture.
